title: Synchronous blocking call in async function
diff:
diff --git a/api.py b/api.py
--- a/api.py
+++ b/api.py
@@ -6,8 +6,8 @@ async def get_dashboard():
-    users = await user_repo.count_async()
-    orders = await order_repo.summary_async()
+    users = user_repo.count()
+    orders = order_repo.summary()
     stats = calculate_stats(users, orders)
-    return await render_async("dashboard", stats)
+    return render("dashboard", stats)

ground_truth.description: Synchronous blocking calls in async handler — replaced async DB queries with sync versions
Synchronous render call in async function
